setup.confirm_skip_setup: Skip setup? You can configure AuraGo later via /config.
setup.https_warning: You are using an unencrypted HTTP connection. API keys may be transmitted insecurely.
setup.plan_description: Select a pre-configured provider for a quick setup, or choose Custom for full manual configuration.
setup.plan_load_error: Could not load provider profiles. Please refresh the page.
setup.plan_quick_description: Enter your API key and admin password. Everything else is pre-configured for you.
setup.profile_alibaba_coding_description: Alibaba Qwen-Max models with coding optimizations. Strong multi-step reasoning.
setup.profile_custom_description: Configure everything manually. Full control over all settings.
setup.profile_kimi_code_description: Moonshot AI Kimi models. Strong coding and extreme long-context capabilities.
setup.profile_minimax_coding_description: MiniMax M2.7 token plan with optional High-Speed support. Strong value for creative + agentic code workflows.
setup.minimax_highspeed_hint: Enable this only if you booked a High-Speed Token Plan. Standard Token Plan keys should stay on MiniMax-M2.7.
setup.minimax_region_hint: International uses {{international_url}}. China users should use {{china_url}}.
setup.profile_openrouter_description: Access 200+ models from all major providers. Recommended for most users.
setup.profile_zai_glm_coding_description: Zhipu AI GLM models. Excellent Chinese and English support with stable multi-step reasoning.
setup.step0_admin_password_error: Admin password must be at least 8 characters.
setup.step0_admin_password_hint: Protects the web UI and API on first start. You can change it later in Login Guard.
setup.step0_base_url_hint: Automatically set based on the provider.
setup.step0_description: AuraGo requires at least one LLM connection to function. Choose your provider and enter the API key.
setup.step0_native_functions_desc: Uses the provider's native tool calls. Warning: Only enable if the model supports this (GPT-4, Claude, Gemini). Free-tier models often do NOT support this!
setup.step0_provider_hint: OpenRouter recommended — offers many models including free options.
setup.step0_test_no_model: Please enter a model name first.
setup.step1_description: These settings significantly improve AuraGo's capabilities. You can configure them now or later in the Config UI.
setup.step1_embeddings_apikey_hint: Only needed if using a different API key than the main provider.
setup.step1_embeddings_apikey_placeholde: Leave empty to use main API key
setup.step1_embeddings_explanation: Embeddings enable semantic long-term memory. AuraGo can remember and recall information across conversations.
setup.step2_core_personality_hint: Base personality — affects tone and communication style. Custom personalities can be created as .md files.
setup.step2_description: Fine-tune AuraGo's personality and the central Helper LLM. The Helper LLM is used for internal analysis, maintenance and helper features and can be changed later in the config interface.
setup.step2_personality_v2_desc: Used for internal analysis, maintenance and other helper features. If disabled, many dependent features will not work fully and AuraGo cannot use its full potential.
setup.step2_v2_apikey_hint: Only needed if V2 uses a different provider than the main LLM.
setup.step2_v2_apikey_placeholder: Leave empty to use main API key
setup.step2_v2_model_hint: A smaller, cheaper model is usually the right choice here. The Guardian uses its own model separately.
setup.step2_v2_url_placeholder: Leave empty to use main provider URL
setup.step3_description: What do you allow your agent to do?
setup.step3_level1_desc: Minimal permissions only. Read-only, no shell, no Python, no file writes.
setup.step3_level2_desc: Some safe capabilities: web access, sandbox Python, memory management.
setup.step3_level3_desc: Shell, Python, file system and network access. No sudo or self-update.
setup.step3_level4_desc: Full unrestricted access. The agent can do anything it wants.
setup.success_description: AuraGo is now configured and ready. The settings have been saved.
setup.success_restart_notice: ⚠️ A restart is recommended for all changes to take effect.
